# containers_image_copy (Resource)

Copies a container image from a source registry to a destination registry.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Copy a single image
resource "containers_image_copy" "basic" {
  source      = "ghcr.io/myorg/myapp:v1.0.0"
  destination = "docker.io/myorg/myapp:v1.0.0"
}

# Copy a multi-arch image with per-architecture tags
resource "containers_image_copy" "multi_arch" {
  source      = "ghcr.io/myorg/myapp:v1.0.0"
  destination = "docker.io/myorg/myapp:v1.0.0"

  arch_tags = {
    "linux/amd64" = "v1.0.0-amd64"
    "linux/arm64" = "v1.0.0-arm64"
  }

  strict_arch_tags = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `destination` (String) The destination image reference (e.g., `registry/repo:tag`)
- `source` (String) The source image reference (e.g., `registry/repo:tag`)

### Optional

- `arch_tags` (Map of String) Map of OCI platform string (e.g. `linux/amd64`) to the final remote tag for that architecture.
- `strict_arch_tags` (Boolean) If true, fail when a platform specified in `arch_tags` is not found in the source manifest list.
- `strict_manifest` (Boolean) If true, fail when `arch_tags` is specified but the source image is not a manifest list.

### Read-Only

- `arch_digests` (Map of String) Map of platform to digest for each copied arch image.
- `destination_digest` (String) The digest of the copied manifest at the destination.
- `id` (String) Resource identifier (set to destination image)
- `source_digest` (String) The digest of the source image at time of copy.
